# MLA Generator

> Free citation generator for APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, Vancouver, IEEE, and AMA. Create accurate references and in-text citations from a URL, DOI, or ISBN — formatted by a deterministic CSL/citeproc engine and editable before you copy.

MLA Generator builds citations from real source metadata (fetched from a URL, or looked up by DOI/ISBN), formats them with a structured citation engine rather than free-text generation, and saves references locally in the browser. It supports the seven major academic citation styles and each edition-accurate guide is written and reviewed by the MLA Generator Editorial Team.

## Citation generators
- [APA Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/apa-citation-generator/): APA 7th edition references and in-text citations.
- [MLA Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/mla-citation-generator/): MLA 9th edition Works Cited entries.
- [Chicago Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/chicago-citation-generator/): Chicago 18th edition (author–date).
- [Harvard Referencing Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/harvard-referencing-generator/): Cite Them Right 12th edition.
- [IEEE Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/ieee-citation-generator/): numeric IEEE reference style.
- [AMA Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/ama-citation-generator/): AMA 11th edition.
- [Vancouver Citation Generator](https://mlagenerator.com/vancouver-citation-generator/): NLM/Vancouver numeric style.

## Guides
- [Citation Guides hub](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/): edition-accurate guides for every style and source type.
- [How to Cite a Website](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/how-to-cite-a-website/)
- [How to Cite a Book](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/how-to-cite-a-book/)
- [How to Cite a Journal Article](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/how-to-cite-a-journal-article/)
- [In-Text Citations](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/in-text-citations/)
- [Research and Works Cited](https://mlagenerator.com/guides/research-and-works-cited/)

## About
- [About & editorial methodology](https://mlagenerator.com/about/): how citations are built, the manuals followed, and how accuracy is maintained.
